# AI Vision Consulting Ltd

> Practical AI training and automation consulting for organisations, professionals, jobseekers and community groups. Based in Newcastle upon Tyne, with remote support available across the UK and local in-person delivery discussed where suitable.

## What We Do

- Practical AI training for individuals and teams
- Corporate AI workshops and capability programmes
- Workflow and automation discovery
- Small-business AI automation support
- Community and employability AI training
- Responsible-use guidance, including privacy, human review and output checking

## Training

Individual training is organised around twelve practical 90-minute topics covering:

- AI foundations, tool selection, prompting and AI-assisted coding
- AI agents and workflow automation
- Research, video, image and simple app creation
- Content systems, digital products, avatars and freelance services

Focused sessions and multi-session bundles are available. Private small-group sessions, corporate workshops and longer team programmes are also offered. See the pricing page for current prices, inclusions and scope.

## Consulting

Automation work begins with the current workflow rather than a predetermined tool. Support can include process mapping, opportunity and risk assessment, pilot design, implementation planning, testing, documentation and handover. Consulting and implementation are quoted according to the systems and work required.
